name: Cinematic Film
description: Classic film look: grain + vignette + subtle bloom + warm grade. The default for hero videos where every frame should feel like a still worth framing.

name: Clean Digital
description: Minimal post-processing for product demos where clarity is paramount. No grain, no vignette — just a slight contrast bump to keep the image from feeling flat.

name: Editorial Subtle
description: Light grain + soft vignette for editorial content. Adds just enough texture to feel crafted without drawing attention to the post-processing.

name: Social Punchy
description: High contrast + slight chromatic softness for social media content. Optimized for small screens and autoplay — punches through the scroll with aggressive tonal separation.

name: Premium Brand
description: Full treatment for brand hero videos. Film grain, vignette, bloom, and chromatic softness layered with a neutral-warm grade. The maximum finish stack — use when every detail matters.
